calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Dec-04-2018 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance. Notice having been given and there being no appearance or objection filed, the Court ordered the case dismissed pursuant to Government Code Section 68608(b). Judge: TERI L. JACKSON; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Proceedings not reported.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Oct-18-2018 Continued To Dec-04-18 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance. Plaintiff's counsel is sanctioned $400.00 for failure to appear. The Order To Show Cause is re-set to DEC-04-2018 at 10:30am in Department 610. This case is subject to dismissal pursuant to Government Code 68608(b) and counsel will be reported to the State Bar if there is no appearance on the next hearing date and compliance. Judge: TERI L. JACKSON; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Proceedings not reported.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jul-10-2018 Continued To Oct-16-18 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance. Plaintiff's counsel is sanctioned $400.00 for failure to appear. The Order To Show Cause is re-set to OCT-16-2018 at 10:30am in Department 610. ***NOTE: The Court intends to notify the State Bar of all the Sanction Orders as required by Business and Professions Code 6086.7 (a)(3) if there is no compliance and outstanding sanctions are not paid by the next hearing date.*** ***NOTICE: Impending Discretionary Dismissal pursuant to Government Code 68608(b).*** Judge: Teri L. Jackson; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Proceedings not reported.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Mar-28-2018 Continued To Jul-10-18 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
MINI MINUTES: No appearance. Plaintiff's counsel is sanctioned $400.00 for failure to appear. The OSC is re-set July 10, 2018 at 10:30 am, in Department 610. Judge: Teri L. Jackson; Clerk: Yolanda Mazariegos; Proceedings not reported. (610)

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jan-25-2018 Continued To Mar-27-18 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
MINI MINUTES: No appearance. Plaintiff's counsel is sanctioned $400.00, for failure to appear. The OSC is re-set to March 27, 2018 at 10:30 am, Department 610. Judge: Teri L. Jackson; Clerk: Yolanda Mazariegos; Proceedings not reported. (610)
